channel.title: Mirantis — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Mirantis (mirantis).

item.title: CVE-2022-0484 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper URL Validation causes Mirantis Container Cloud Lens Extension to open external programs
item.description: Lack of validation of URLs causes Mirantis Container Cloud Lens Extension before v3.1.1 to open external programs other than the default browser to perform sign on to a new cluster. An attacker could host a webserver which serves a malicious Mirantis…

item.title: CVE-2022-0270 · 8.8 HIGH — Improper header sanitization in bored-agent causes escalation of privilege
item.description: Prior to v0.6.1, bored-agent failed to sanitize incoming kubernetes impersonation headers allowing a user to override assigned user name and groups.

item.title: CVE-2021-23218 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Memory Leak in Mirantis Container Runtime (MCR) running in FIPS mode causes a Denial of Service
item.description: When running with FIPS mode enabled, Mirantis Container Runtime 20.10.8 leaks memory during TLS Handshakes which could be abused to cause a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2021-23154 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Command injection in Lens causes arbitrary shell command execution when malicious custom helm chart configuration provided
item.description: In Lens prior to 5.3.4, custom helm chart configuration creates helm commands from string concatenation of provided arguments which are then executed in the user's shell. Arguments can be provided which cause arbitrary shell commands to run on the sy…

item.title: CVE-2021-44458 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Lack of websocket authentication in Lens causes remote code execution when visiting a malicious website
item.description: Linux users running Lens 5.2.6 and earlier could be compromised by visiting a malicious website. The malicious website could make websocket connections from the victim's browser to Lens and so operate the local terminal feature. This would allow the…
